payload.title: Connection-scale + bus-throughput load test
payload.description: Benchmark concurrent SSE connections per Node node (fd/memory ceilings, keepalive cost) and the Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY backbone under realistic agent-fleet write rates. Establish the threshold to graduate from PG NOTIFY to NATS, and capture per-node limits to inform autoscaling + quotas (SCP-127). (From SCP-125.)
